phases.title: STDB schema + reducers
tasks: Add process_observation table (pid pk, host, argv_sha, argv_first, state, ppid, started_micros, rss_kb, cpu_pct, observed_at)
Add resource_anomaly table (id auto pk, detected_at, kind, severity, pids JSON, note, handled, handled_at, handled_by)
Reducer resource_supervisor_tick (60s) — duplicate_argv / rss_oversize / zombie / cpu_pin

phases.title: WASM rebuild + publish
tasks: Verify wasm bytes baked into hex-cli/assets/wasm/

phases.title: Nexus /proc walker
tasks: Linux-only; non-Linux logs warn-once and exits gracefully
Allowlist comm prefixes (hex-nexus, hex-agent, ollama, spacetimedb-stand, claude); env override HEX_RESOURCE_OBSERVER_ALLOW
CPU% computed as delta of (utime+stime) clock ticks per second between observations
lib.rs schedules resource_supervisor_init() at boot (alongside merge_team_init / persona_init)

phases.title: REST + dashboard view
tasks: Solid view #/resources: sortable table, anomaly badges, ack buttons

phases.title: Build + deploy + verify
tasks: Smoke: spawn duplicate hex-agent → curl /api/resources/anomalies shows duplicate_argv within 75s
